parameters.label: Moisture Content
parameters.interpretation: Higher moisture content increases probability of Fail — exceeds SNI 5% limit

parameters.label: Water Activity
parameters.interpretation: Elevated water activity promotes microbial growth, driving Fail prediction

parameters.label: Protein
parameters.interpretation: Lower protein content correlates with substandard raw material quality

parameters.label: Lead (Pb)
parameters.interpretation: Lead concentration approaching SNI 0.50 mg/kg limit triggers high risk

parameters.label: Peroxide Value
parameters.interpretation: High peroxide value indicates lipid oxidation and rancidity risk

parameters.label: Acid Value
parameters.interpretation: Acid value above SNI 2.0 mg KOH/g limit indicates fat degradation

parameters.label: Total Plate Count
parameters.interpretation: Elevated TPC indicates active microbial contamination in product

parameters.label: Yeast & Mold Count
parameters.interpretation: Yeast/mold exceedance signals inadequate hygiene control in process

parameters.label: pH
parameters.interpretation: Abnormal pH deviations correlate with fermentation or contamination issues

parameters.label: Salt Content
parameters.interpretation: Excessive salt content contributes to physicochemical non-compliance

parameters.label: Fat Content
parameters.interpretation: Lower fat deviates from product specification requirements

parameters.label: Cadmium (Cd)
parameters.interpretation: Cadmium approaching SNI 0.20 mg/kg limit signals heavy metal risk
